# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3  # Istio's version of the API (should match your deployment)
kind: DestinationRule  
metadata:   
 name: default-destinationrule    
 namespace: istio-system     
 labels:       
   app: default        
spec:         
 host: "*"  # This allows traffic to go anywhere in the mesh. Be careful with this, it can lead into security issues! Only use wildcards (*) when you're sure about what your configuration is doing and are willing to accept potential risks (like DNS rebinding).  
 subsets:     
 - name: default  # Name of subset for traffic routing rules
